column.text:
• Seattle Mariners placed RHP Cooper Criswell on the 15-day injured list with a right shoulder strain.
• Colorado Rockies designated RHP Keegan Thompson for assignment.
• Houston Astros placed 1B LaMonte Wade Jr. on the 10-day injured list with a right hamstring strain.
• Chicago Cubs placed RHP Jameson Taillon on the 15-day injured list retroactive to June 8.
• Toronto Blue Jays activated RHP Dylan Cease from the 15-day injured list.
• Chicago Cubs activated RF Matt Shaw from the 10-day injured list.
• Houston Astros sent RHP Cristian Javier on a rehab assignment to Sugar Land Space Cowboys.
• Toronto Blue Jays sent C Alejandro Kirk on a rehab assignment to Buffalo Bisons.
• Seattle Mariners sent C Cal Raleigh on a rehab assignment to Tacoma Rainiers.

x_article.title: MLB Daily Recap
